calendar.matters:
MOTION / Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Janice Parish To Perpetuate Testimony Of Lowell Parish By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar May-06-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrew Chew of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing through CourtCall for petitioner Janice Parish.
Stephen L. Jenkins of WFBM, LLP (415-781-7072), appearing through CourtCall for Specially Appearing defendant Turner Construction Co.

RULING:
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling amended: The Petition of Janice Parish to Perpetuate Testimony of Lowell Parish by Videotaped Deposition is GRANTED pursuant to C.C.P. 2035.010. Petitioner filed proof of service as to all prospective defendants named in the petition. Objections filed by Specially Appearing Turner Construction Co. All parties must file a Notice of Appearance within two court days upon receipt of this order. The deposition is to take place by Zoom technology. Date of deposition on or before July 6, 2021 as parties stipulate to 60 days and deposition questions limited to Paragraph 13 Section a, b, c of the Petition. Court to issue order. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Reporter: Veronica Rodriguez, CSR #12215 (Tel: 323-445-6798) Email: bzyfngrz@yahoo.com. (503/CML)

MOTION / Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Janice Parish To Perpetuate Testimony Of Lowell Parish By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Apr-29-2021 Continued To May-06-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Petition of Janice Parish to Perpetuate Testimony of Lowell Parish by Videotaped Deposition is continued on the Court's own motion to May 6, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 503. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
